plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.restart_notice: Restart required to apply plugin changes.
plugins.registry_priority: Configuration priority: runtime > user > default | Active source: {source}{path}
plugins.no_plugins_for_section: No plugins available for this section.
plugins.empty.management_core_free: Management extensions are available in Pro. Core Free keeps the stage only for pipeline compatibility.
plugins.empty.service_core_free: Service extensions are not bundled in Core Free. Add them in another release profile later.
plugins.tagline.default: This plugin adds capabilities to the meeting pipeline.
plugins.body.default: This plugin adds capabilities to the meeting pipeline.
plugins.howto.default: Enable the plugin to make it available in the app.
plugins.howto.transcription:
1. Open Settings > Transcription.
2. Select model and verify binary path.
3. Run a meeting to produce transcript.
plugins.howto.llm_processing:
1. Open Settings > AI Processing.
2. Select provider and model.
3. Run a meeting to produce summary.
plugins.howto.management:
1. Run AI Processing to generate summary.
2. Management plugins extract tasks, projects, and agendas.
3. Review the result in Meetings workspace.
plugins.howto.service:
1. Enable plugin.
2. Use in Meetings (search, indexing, integrations).
3. Check logs if external service fails.
plugins.blurb.transcription: Converts audio into text so meetings can be analyzed further.
plugins.blurb.llm_processing: Builds summaries and structure from meeting text.
plugins.blurb.management: Turns results into tasks, projects, and agendas.
plugins.blurb.service: Adds service features: search, indexing, and integrations.

meetings.rename.source_message:
Rename original source file too?

This works only for files in app-managed import folders.
External files stay unchanged for safety.
